name: clawapp-blueclaw
description: Cross-platform mobile client for OpenClaw Gateway: SwiftUI iOS + H5/PWA + Node.js proxy server

features.title: Proxy Server SSE Mode
features.description: SSE long-polling relay between mobile client and OpenClaw Gateway. Handles Ed25519 device signature handshake and event streaming.

features.title: Proxy Server WS Passthrough
features.description: WebSocket passthrough mode for H5 WS-Compat clients.

features.title: Proxy Server HTTP POST Fallback
features.description: HTTP POST fallback when SSE is blocked by firewall.

features.title: Ed25519 Device Signature
features.description: Compatible with OpenClaw 2.15+ device authentication. Proxy server signs challenge from Gateway using Ed25519.

features.title: Proxy Token Authentication
features.description: Bearer token auth for mobile clients connecting to Proxy Server.

features.title: SSE Event Buffer & Resume
features.description: 200-event ring buffer enables reconnect/resume on brief disconnections.

features.title: Offline Message Queue
features.description: Messages sent while offline are queued and flushed on reconnect.

features.title: Install Script (Linux/macOS/Windows)
features.description: One-command deployment script for Proxy Server.

features.title: Docker Compose Deployment
features.description: Production-ready Docker Compose setup for Proxy Server.

features.title: iOS Gateway WS Protocol
features.description: Full OpenClaw Gateway WS protocol implementation in Swift (ported from BlueClaw).

features.title: iOS Proxy SSE Client
features.description: Swift SSE client for connecting to Proxy Server. Handles reconnection and event parsing.

features.title: iOS Connection Mode Switcher
features.description: UI for switching between Proxy SSE / WS Direct / SSH Tunnel modes.

features.title: iOS Chat UI
features.description: SwiftUI chat view with message bubbles, markdown rendering, and streaming text effect.

features.title: iOS Keychain Ed25519 Key Storage
features.description: Device Ed25519 key pair stored in iOS Keychain. Generated on first launch.

features.title: iOS Biometric Auth
features.description: Face ID / Touch ID lock screen before accessing the app.

features.title: iOS Session Management
features.description: List/create/switch chat sessions.

features.title: H5 Proxy SSE + HTTP POST Client
features.description: Browser-side SSE client and HTTP POST fallback for connecting to Proxy Server.

features.title: H5 IndexedDB Offline Cache
features.description: Messages cached in IndexedDB. Survives page refresh and works offline.

features.title: H5 Markdown Rendering
features.description: Markdown rendering with XSS protection for AI responses.

features.title: H5 PWA Support
features.description: Service worker + manifest for "Add to Home Screen" installation.

features.title: H5 Dark/Light Theme
features.description: Auto-follows system theme. Manual toggle available.

features.title: Shared Protocol TypeScript Definitions
features.description: Cross-platform protocol types (frame, methods, chat-types) shared between iOS (via TS overlay) and H5.
